subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is a fresh, verdant, green and flourishing branch from the Tree of Thy divine Oneness, graceful, beauteous and adorned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی هذا فرع خضل نضر اخضر ریان من سدره فردانیتک رشیق انیق مزین
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
